title: Knowledge Extraction Template
description: LLM output schema for ingest Step 2. Each field maps to a specific column in schema.sql that requires LLM population.

chunk_summary.description: 2-3 sentence factual summary of this chunk. Maps to raw_chunks.summary — the primary text for semantic vector retrieval (summary_vector). Also shared with page_timeline.source_description.

page_title.description: Concise descriptive title for the wiki entity page. Maps to pages.title — used for trigram fuzzy search (gin_trgm_ops index). Prefer noun phrases extracted or inferred from the chunk's heading or topic.

compiled_truth.description: Synthesized canonical description of what this chunk establishes as knowledge. Maps to pages.compiled_truth — the PRIMARY content for vector search (truth_embedding) and AI question answering. Write as a definitive statement covering who, what, when, conditions, and consequences. Do NOT write 'This document says...' — write the truth directly. 80-300 words.

suggested_tags.description: 2-6 hierarchical tags that classify this content. REQUIRED. Maps to tags table (name, label, description columns).

name.description: Machine-readable short name. Maps to tags.name. Use lowercase with underscores (e.g. 'makeup_exam_policy').

label.description: Human-readable display name. Maps to tags.label (VARCHAR 256).

description.description: One-line explanation of this tag's scope. Maps to tags.description (TEXT).

parent_hint.description: Suggested parent tag name for hierarchy construction. Empty or unmatched → created as root-level tag. The persistence layer matches this against existing tag names and sets tags.parent_id accordingly, then computes the ltree path.

effective_range.description: Content timeliness annotation. REQUIRED. Maps to both raw_chunks.effective_range and pages.effective_range (tstzrange). Used for: (1) time-scoped retrieval optimization, (2) defensive staleness warnings when content may be outdated.

start.description: Earliest applicable date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). null if not mentioned or not applicable.

end.description: Expiration or end-of-validity date. null if indefinite or not applicable.

description.description: Natural language description of the time range for human review (e.g. '2024-2025学年第一学期').

stale_risk.description: LLM assessment of how quickly this content becomes outdated. 'low' = fundamental/stable content. 'medium' = periodically updated procedures. 'high' = frequently changing (annual policies, temporary rules). 'unknown' = insufficient information. Used by retrieval to surface freshness warnings.
